title: GHP Jersey
description: This GHP team jersey represents the BMX racing brand Greg Hill Products, founded by BMX champion Greg Hill. GHP became known for producing high-performance BMX racing frames and equipment, continuing Hill’s influence on the sport following his dominant racing career in the 1980s.
additional_context: Greg Hill Products (GHP) was founded by BMX champion Greg Hill, one of the most dominant racers of the 1980s. Hill won numerous national championships and international titles, including the IBMXF World Championship in 1985, helping establish GHP as a respected name in BMX racing equipment and rider-driven design.
